steps.title: Identify the modified subject
steps.content: The opening phrase Far from being modern inventions must describe the subject that follows it. The only thing in the sentence that can be modern inventions is drinking straws.

steps.title: Avoid misplaced modifiers
steps.content: A makes Sumerians the subject, C makes the use of straws the subject, and D makes ancient Mesopotamia the subject. Those subjects cannot be modern inventions. The answer is B.
